capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.notes: Skill surface BUILT 2026-07-05 (was the gap): search_kb skill (module:kb, action=search) matches title/question/answer server-side with the same reach as the public KnowledgeBasePage search box — published-only by default, featured-then-views ranking; new 'search' action in the KB handler in agent-execute. Stays partial pending deploy (agent-execute) + skills sync + a Stage-3 live search run. Public UI search remains client-side substring (server FTS is the remaining depth item).
